incomeRankingScreen.title: Income Ranking
incomeRankingScreen.infoContent:
Income Ranking Info:

1. Total Income: Total rewards earned from answering questions
2. Monthly Income: Total rewards earned this month
3. Weekly Income: Total rewards earned this week

Rankings are updated every hour

addRewardScreen.title: Add Reward

tips.text:
Users can add rewards to encourage high-quality answers.

After the question is resolved, the reward amount will be automatically distributed according to platform rules:
- Accepted answerers receive a corresponding share of the reward
- The platform charges a certain service fee
- The remaining reward is distributed based on acceptance and contribution

After adding a reward, users receive corresponding acceptance quotas and can accept satisfactory answers. Accepted answers participate in reward distribution.
